title: The Modifiger
description: Add Build master of Illager. be careful their creation...
body:
# The Modifiger

![modifiger and building](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Fk7ERY4j/images/fb7295346dd2f24244bd1a7a8111072ac5cf21e1.png)

## Summary

This mod is add builder of Illager. Modifiger!

They will appear when raiding and will try to stop you with their buildings.

don't worry. building will break when killed modifiger!

This mod also add Illagers Monster Spawner and Arrow Spawner. even active when Villager and Iron Golem Here!
